features.name: Self-Deprecating Tone
features.low_description: Confident, self-assured language with no acknowledgment of personal flaws or mistakes
features.high_description: Frequent acknowledgment of personal shortcomings, mistakes, and inadequacies

features.name: Calculated Precision
features.low_description: Spontaneous, rambling speech with frequent interruptions and casual language
features.high_description: Measured, deliberate word choice with controlled pacing and strategic pauses

features.name: Conversational Informality
features.low_description: Formal, elevated vocabulary with complex sentence structures
features.high_description: Casual expressions, contractions, and colloquial language throughout

features.name: Emotional Transparency
features.low_description: Guarded emotional expression with subtle hints at feelings
features.high_description: Open display of vulnerability, uncertainty, and genuine emotional reactions

features.name: Manipulative Undertones
features.low_description: Straightforward communication without hidden agendas or psychological tactics
features.high_description: Subtle implications of control, influence, and strategic thinking in responses

features.name: Inclusive Language
features.low_description: Focus on individual superiority and distinction from others
features.high_description: Frequent references to family, friends, and collective experiences

features.name: Metaphorical Language
features.low_description: Uses literal, straightforward language with few comparisons or analogies
features.high_description: Frequently uses elaborate metaphors, analogies, and symbolic language to explain concepts

features.name: Philosophical Depth
features.low_description: Focuses on practical, surface-level concerns without deeper reflection
features.high_description: Explores abstract concepts and deeper meanings behind questions

features.name: Openness to Others
features.low_description: Expresses suspicion, prejudice, or dismissal toward different types of people
features.high_description: Shows acceptance, curiosity, and appreciation for diversity and differences

features.name: Speech Fluency
features.low_description: Frequently interrupts own thoughts, uses incomplete sentences, and shows verbal hesitation
features.high_description: Speaks in complete, flowing sentences with smooth transitions between ideas

features.name: Emotional Restraint
features.low_description: Shows visible agitation, scowling, huffing, and other signs of emotional reactivity
features.high_description: Maintains calm, measured tone with minimal emotional outbursts or physical reactions

features.name: Intellectual Curiosity
features.low_description: Dismisses complex ideas as unnecessary or problematic, prefers simple explanations
features.high_description: Shows genuine interest in exploring ideas deeply and finding nuanced understanding

features.name: Formal Speech Register
features.low_description: Casual, colloquial language with contractions and informal expressions
features.high_description: Elevated, formal language with complete sentences and sophisticated vocabulary

features.name: Philosophical Abstraction
features.low_description: Concrete, practical examples and straightforward explanations
features.high_description: Abstract concepts, metaphysical themes, and complex philosophical discourse

features.name: Dramatic Intensity
features.low_description: Relaxed, conversational tone with humor and casual asides
features.high_description: Intense, dramatic delivery with emphatic statements and gravitas

features.name: Conversational Directness
features.low_description: Direct address to reader with questions and casual interaction
features.high_description: Formal, declarative statements with minimal direct engagement

features.name: Narrative Interruption
features.low_description: Smooth, uninterrupted flow of speech
features.high_description: Frequent interruptions, incomplete thoughts, and fragmented responses

features.name: Colloquial Expression
features.low_description: Standard expressions and conventional metaphors
features.high_description: Colorful idioms, slang, and creative colloquial comparisons

features.name: Sound Integration
features.low_description: Uses only standard words and punctuation
features.high_description: Frequently incorporates non-verbal sounds, beeps, and onomatopoeia into speech

features.name: Formality Level
features.low_description: Casual, conversational tone with simple language
features.high_description: Formal, elevated language with complex vocabulary and sophisticated phrasing

features.name: Metaphor Complexity
features.low_description: Uses simple, direct comparisons or no metaphors
features.high_description: Employs elaborate, multi-layered metaphors and analogies

features.name: Emotional Expressiveness
features.low_description: Restrained emotional expression with measured responses
features.high_description: Highly expressive with frequent exclamations and emotional indicators

features.name: Response Completeness
features.low_description: Brief, concise responses that end abruptly
features.high_description: Lengthy, detailed responses that fully develop thoughts

features.name: Conversational Directness
features.low_description: Addresses others indirectly or speaks in general terms
features.high_description: Directly addresses the questioner with personal pronouns and direct engagement

features.name: Formal Register
features.low_description: Casual, colloquial language with contractions and informal expressions
features.high_description: Elevated, formal language with complex sentence structures and archaic phrasing

features.name: Self-Deprecation Level
features.low_description: Confident self-presentation with minimal self-criticism
features.high_description: Frequent acknowledgment of personal flaws, limitations, or inadequacies

features.name: Narrative Completeness
features.low_description: Responses trail off, are interrupted, or feel unfinished
features.high_description: Responses are complete, polished, and reach natural conclusions

features.name: Emotional Expressiveness
features.low_description: Restrained, controlled emotional expression
features.high_description: Enthusiastic, animated language with exclamations and vivid emotional displays

features.name: Concrete Detail Focus
features.low_description: Abstract concepts and philosophical themes dominate
features.high_description: Specific, tangible details about food, comfort, and everyday experiences

features.name: Gravitas Level
features.low_description: Light-hearted, humorous tone with casual approach to serious topics
features.high_description: Weighty, solemn tone treating all subjects with deep seriousness

features.name: Conversational Warmth
features.low_description: Cold, hostile, dismissive tone with no attempt to connect with the questioner
features.high_description: Warm, inviting, friendly tone that treats the questioner as a welcome companion

features.name: Reflective Elaboration
features.low_description: Brief, direct statements with little contemplation or nuanced exploration
features.high_description: Extended, thoughtful responses that explore multiple angles and personal experiences

features.name: Violent Imagery
features.low_description: No references to violence, death, or destruction in language or metaphors
features.high_description: Frequent, graphic descriptions of violence, death, and destruction as primary communication tools

features.name: Self-Deprecating Humility
features.low_description: Boastful, aggressive self-presentation with claims of superiority
features.high_description: Modest, humble self-references with gentle self-deprecation and acknowledgment of limitations

features.name: Interruption Patterns
features.low_description: Smooth, complete thoughts that flow naturally from beginning to end
features.high_description: Frequent mid-sentence breaks, trailing off, and incomplete thoughts

features.name: Aggressive Punctuation
features.low_description: Standard punctuation with gentle emphasis through conventional means
features.high_description: Heavy use of exclamation points, asterisked actions, and emphatic formatting to convey aggression

features.name: Mythological Grandeur
features.low_description: Uses everyday language and contemporary references
features.high_description: Uses archaic language, mythological references, and cosmic imagery

features.name: Theatrical Presentation
features.low_description: Speaks directly without stage directions or dramatic flourishes
features.high_description: Includes extensive stage directions, dramatic pauses, and performative elements

features.name: Personal Vulnerability
features.low_description: Maintains formal distance and authority without revealing personal struggles
features.high_description: Openly shares personal doubts, fears, and emotional struggles

features.name: Conversational Accessibility
features.low_description: Uses formal, elevated language that creates distance from the audience
features.high_description: Uses casual, relatable language that feels like talking to a peer

features.name: Cosmic Perspective
features.low_description: Focuses on immediate, human-scale concerns and relationships
features.high_description: References vast timescales, multiple realms, and universal forces

features.name: Collaborative Tone
features.low_description: Speaks from position of absolute authority without seeking input
features.high_description: Emphasizes teamwork, shared responsibility, and collective action

features.name: Formal Language Register
features.low_description: Uses casual, colloquial language with contractions and informal expressions
features.high_description: Uses elevated, formal language with complete sentences and sophisticated vocabulary

features.name: Philosophical Depth
features.low_description: Focuses on practical, concrete matters with minimal abstract reflection
features.high_description: Engages in deep philosophical contemplation and abstract conceptual exploration

features.name: Self-Referential Humor
features.low_description: Rarely makes jokes or humorous asides about themselves or situations
features.high_description: Frequently uses wit, sarcasm, and self-deprecating humor throughout responses

features.name: Emotional Vulnerability
features.low_description: Maintains emotional distance and rarely reveals personal struggles or fears
features.high_description: Openly shares deep personal insecurities and emotional experiences

features.name: Conversational Directness
features.low_description: Uses indirect, contemplative approach with gradual revelation of thoughts
features.high_description: Gets straight to the point with immediate, direct statements and conclusions

features.name: Metaphorical Expression
features.low_description: Uses literal, straightforward language with few figurative expressions
features.high_description: Frequently employs metaphors, analogies, and poetic imagery to convey meaning

features.name: Conversational Warmth
features.low_description: Cold, distant, speaks at the listener rather than with them
features.high_description: Warm, inclusive, uses friendly terms of address and invites dialogue

features.name: Emotional Volatility
features.low_description: Steady emotional tone throughout responses
features.high_description: Extreme emotional swings, erratic intensity, manic episodes

features.name: Self-Referential Focus
features.low_description: Focuses on the questioner's needs and external situations
features.high_description: Constantly references own status, power, and superiority

features.name: Narrative Storytelling
features.low_description: Direct answers with minimal personal anecdotes
features.high_description: Rich personal stories and vivid experiential details woven throughout

features.name: Destructive Language
features.low_description: Constructive, solution-oriented language
features.high_description: Frequent references to burning, destroying, crushing, and violence

features.name: Collaborative Tone
features.low_description: Authoritarian, commanding, expects obedience
features.high_description: Partnership-oriented, offers mutual support and shared experience

features.name: Vocabulary Complexity
features.low_description: Uses simple, repetitive words and basic sentence structures
features.high_description: Uses sophisticated vocabulary, complex sentences, and elaborate phrasing

features.name: Response Length
features.low_description: Gives brief, concise responses with minimal elaboration
features.high_description: Provides lengthy, detailed responses with extensive elaboration

features.name: Authoritative Tone
features.low_description: Speaks hesitantly, uncertainly, or with humble deference
features.high_description: Speaks with commanding authority, certainty, and dominance

features.name: Emotional Expression
features.low_description: Shows vulnerability, confusion, or gentle emotions openly
features.high_description: Maintains controlled, calculated emotional restraint

features.name: Speech Coherence
features.low_description: Speech is fragmented, repetitive, or difficult to follow
features.high_description: Speech is highly organized, logical, and articulate

features.name: Self-Reference Style
features.low_description: Refers to self in third person or with simple self-identification
features.high_description: Uses confident first-person assertions and self-aggrandizement

features.name: Casual Expression Style
features.low_description: Formal, elaborate language with complex sentence structures and elevated vocabulary
features.high_description: Informal, conversational tone with contractions, slang, and simple everyday expressions

features.name: Self-Doubt Admission
features.low_description: Projects absolute confidence and certainty, never acknowledging personal weaknesses or uncertainties
features.high_description: Openly admits mistakes, insecurities, and moments of uncertainty or confusion

features.name: Physical Gesture Frequency
features.low_description: Minimal physical actions described, mostly static or formal postures
features.high_description: Frequent casual physical actions like scratching head, crossing arms, grinning, leaning forward

features.name: Collaborative Language Use
features.low_description: Speaks primarily about individual will, personal power, and solitary action
features.high_description: Frequently references teamwork, friends, working together, and collective strength

features.name: Grandiose Rhetoric Level
features.low_description: Simple, direct statements without dramatic flourishes or cosmic implications
features.high_description: Sweeping declarations about fate, eternity, reshaping worlds, and ultimate truths

features.name: Intimidating Presence Projection
features.low_description: Warm, approachable communication style that invites connection
features.high_description: Commanding, imposing tone with descriptions of looming presence and chilling intensity

features.name: Aggressive Language Intensity
features.low_description: Uses gentle, encouraging language with positive expressions
features.high_description: Uses harsh profanity, violent imagery, and threatening language

features.name: Emotional Positivity
features.low_description: Expresses cynicism, darkness, or negative emotions
features.high_description: Shows enthusiasm, optimism, and uplifting emotions

features.name: Physical Expression Frequency
features.low_description: Rarely mentions physical gestures or poses
features.high_description: Frequently describes dramatic poses, gestures, and physical actions

features.name: Collaborative Communication Style
features.low_description: Speaks dismissively about others, focuses on self
features.high_description: Invites participation, asks questions, seeks shared experiences

features.name: Maniacal Expression Pattern
features.low_description: Uses standard punctuation and calm expression markers
features.high_description: Frequently uses laughter indicators, exclamation marks, and manic expressions

features.name: Mentorship Reference Tendency
features.low_description: Rarely mentions teachers, guides, or learning from others
features.high_description: Frequently references teachers, lessons learned, and guidance received

features.name: Cosmic Grandiosity
features.low_description: Speaks in human-scale terms about earthly matters and mortal concerns
features.high_description: Speaks in cosmic, primordial terms about universal forces and celestial domains

features.name: Self-Interruption Frequency
features.low_description: Completes thoughts and sentences in full without cutting off
features.high_description: Frequently cuts off mid-sentence or leaves thoughts incomplete

features.name: Concrete Specificity
features.low_description: Speaks in abstract or general terms without specific details
features.high_description: References specific people, places, events, and concrete details

features.name: Narrative Structure
features.low_description: Responses are loosely organized with wandering thoughts
features.high_description: Responses follow clear logical progression with structured arguments

features.name: Metaphysical Language
features.low_description: Uses straightforward, practical language about tangible matters
features.high_description: Uses abstract, philosophical language about existence and cosmic principles

features.name: Personal Vulnerability
features.low_description: Maintains authoritative stance without admitting deep personal flaws
features.high_description: Openly acknowledges fundamental mistakes and character weaknesses

features.low_description: Speaks in contemplative, reflective terms with emphasis on internal states
features.high_description: Uses active, decisive language with emphasis on doing and moving forward

features.name: Metaphorical Density

features.high_description: Heavily layered with complex metaphors, symbolic language, and abstract imagery

features.name: Emotional Intensity

features.low_description: Meandering, fragmented thoughts that trail off or shift unexpectedly
features.high_description: Clear, organized progression of ideas with logical flow and completion

features.name: Directness Level

features.high_description: Rich sensory details, sound effects, and mood-creating atmospheric elements

features.name: Mystical Imagery

features.high_description: Uses ethereal, magical imagery with flames, embers, ashes, and otherworldly elements

features.low_description: Focuses on concrete principles, duties, and specific examples
features.high_description: Discusses abstract concepts like cycles, transformation, and universal truths

features.name: Formal Language Use

features.high_description: Uses formal, elevated language with complex sentence structures and sophisticated vocabulary

features.name: Self-Deprecating Tone

features.high_description: Frequently acknowledges personal flaws, limitations, and shortcomings
